overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic desert city, ascending a concrete pedestrian overpass, and overlooking an industrial district with corporate towers and construction sites under a bright clear sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban street with pedestrian overpass entrance

events.description: approaching and entering the covered concrete pedestrian overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk toward the entrance of a massive concrete pedestrian staircase structure

entered.detail: tall pole with orange horizontal light fixture characteristic of Night City street furniture
massive brutalist concrete structure with integrated lighting serving as pedestrian overpass entrance
curved elevated roadway structure with vehicles traveling on it
large pinkish-red industrial facility with visible signage and storage tanks

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at street level in a futuristic desert city, approaching a massive concrete pedestrian overpass. The camera moves forward past distinctive orange street lamps toward the entrance of the brutalist staircase structure, with an elevated highway and red industrial buildings visible in the background under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete pedestrian staircase with integrated linear lighting

events.description: beginning ascent of the long concrete staircase following pedestrians ahead
transitioning from shaded interior to brighter upper level as sky becomes visible

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs following two pedestrians ahead while moving through the covered structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt ascending stairs ahead of ego

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with geometric shadow patterns from overhead structure
vertical strip lighting fixtures mounted on the concrete walls of the overpass
solid concrete roof of the pedestrian structure creating shade
metal handrail along the right side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the covered staircase and begins ascending, following pedestrians ahead. The environment shifts to a narrow enclosed space with concrete walls, linear fluorescent lighting, and geometric shadows cast by the overhead structure. The sky becomes visible through openings as the camera climbs higher.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with panoramic highway and city views

events.description: emerging from fully covered section to open overlook with expansive highway and industrial district views

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper pedestrian bridge looking out over the multi-lane highway and distant industrial district with mountains in the background

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in athletic wear walking ahead on the pathway

entered.detail: expansive view of multi-lane highway with moving traffic below the pedestrian bridge
arid desert mountains with smoke plumes rising in the distance
large industrial building with pink facade and corporate signage visible across the highway
safety barrier along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: Having reached the upper level, the camera moves along a semi-covered pedestrian walkway with open views of the highway and distant industrial district. The scene reveals a sprawling urban desert landscape with mountains in the background, while other pedestrians walk along the pathway and traffic moves on the highway below.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial construction overlook with massive corporate tower view

events.description: approaching large industrial construction site with towering corporate building dominating the view

agents.ego_description: slowing to observe the massive industrial corporate tower and surrounding construction equipment before continuing along the walkway

entered.detail: massive dark skyscraper with vertical white signage and industrial infrastructure at its base
yellow construction equipment and cranes positioned around the tower base
metal framework and construction materials surrounding the building site
dark smoke rising from industrial facilities in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on a massive industrial construction site featuring a towering corporate skyscraper with vertical signage. The camera moves along the elevated walkway, revealing construction cranes, scaffolding, and industrial equipment at the tower's base, with smoke plumes visible against the distant desert mountains. The environment is devoid of pedestrians, emphasizing the industrial scale of the architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the street level of a futuristic desert city up onto an elevated pedestrian overpass overlooking a massive industrial district. It begins by moving past orange street lamps toward a brutalist concrete staircase, with red industrial buildings and a clear blue sky visible in the distance. As the camera enters the staircase, the environment shifts into a narrow enclosed space defined by linear fluorescent lighting and geometric shadows before the sky gradually reappears through the openings. The scene then opens onto a semi-covered walkway, expanding the view to reveal a sprawling urban desert landscape with traffic flowing on the highway below and mountains on the horizon. Finally, the camera glides toward a towering corporate skyscraper, shifting focus to the immense scale of construction cranes, scaffolding, and smoke plumes rising against the distant peaks.
